chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeal No.428 of 2023 Amina Haider and another Versus Mst. Haseena Bano and others DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing case (priority) 1. For hearing of CMA No.5411/2023 (U/S-5). 2. For order on office objection 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For hearing of CMA No.5413/2023 (Stay)..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 19.04.2024 Mr. Rashid Hussain, Advocate for appellants. Respondent No.1 Mst. Haseena Bano is present in person along with her daughter Mahrukh Fatima..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. After arguing the matter at length, learned counsel for the appellants has conceded that if process of inquiry, especially in respect of three properties mentioned under the heading of immoveable properties at typed page-3 of the impugned order, be conducted at the earliest. The only concern of the learned counsel for the appellant is that the inquiry, as likely to be conducted under Order-XX Rule-13 CPC, may take long. We may observe that once the inquiry started in terms of Order-XX Rule-13 CPC, it may be taken to its logical end at the earliest and may not be prolonged. The parties to the suit may assist the inquiry officer/Nazir in reaching to a lawful and proper conclusion as to ownerships of properties. The appeal stands disposed of along with pending applications. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
